value_picks.name: Cognizant Technology Solutions

pe_discount.detail: Fwd PE 8.92 vs implied PE at $80 target / $6.13 fwd EPS = 13.05 → 31.6% discount

catalysts_general: Trading 31.6% below analyst median target $80 with 26 covering analysts
Forward PE 8.92 vs trailing 11.87 implies meaningful EPS expansion expected
PEG 0.9 with 2.4% dividend creates yield+growth combination at valuation trough

downside_scenarios.scenario: Tests 52w low on AI-displacement headlines or weak consulting bookings
Recession scenario with consulting budget cuts; would imply ~21% downside

ideal_entry.reasoning: Buy near 52w low $52.44 for asymmetric setup; 6/6 framework score with FCF and dividend creating downside cushion

Indian IT services peer not in input — typically priced higher despite similar growth

value_picks.analyst_take: Cleanest 6/6 value setup in the cohort — net cash, 7%+ FCF yield, covered dividend, 32% analyst-implied upside. Short interest building suggests crowded AI-displacement bear thesis that creates contrarian opportunity. Buy near $54-55 with patience for 60-90 day catalyst (earnings or sector rotation).

PEG 0.68 indicates valuation has decoupled from earnings trajectory
18.4% short interest creates squeeze potential on any positive surprise

downside_scenarios.scenario: Breaks 52w low on continued GenAI displacement narrative

ideal_entry.reasoning: Sub-52w-low scale-in; net cash and 12% FCF yield create strong downside floor while waiting for AI-engineering demand to absorb GenAI noise

value_picks.name: Atlassian Corporation

pe_discount.detail: Fwd PE 12.72 vs implied PE at $120 target / $5.54 fwd EPS = 21.66 → 41.3% discount

drawdown.detail: 70.87% below 52w high $242.00 — deepest drawdown in cohort

balance_sheet.detail: Net cash $351M but D/E 76.4% and current ratio 0.89 (<1.0) signal tight working capital

ai_exposure.detail: Knowledge-management/collaboration tools (Jira/Confluence) face direct competition from AI agents that can summarize and orchestrate work autonomously; Loom video has clear AI substitution risk. Atlassian is investing in Rovo agents but the moat is narrowing.

deal_radar.assessment: Short interest 7.92% with +28.0% MoM build (largest increase in cohort); thesis is likely AI-substitution + slowing seat growth. Negative trailing EPS adds binary-print risk.

catalysts_general: 84% gross margins indicate strong unit economics despite GAAP losses
Revenue growing +23.3% (fastest in cohort) but operating margin -3.0% raises FCF-to-GAAP gap concerns
Trading at 8x FCF and 41% below analyst median $120
Current ratio 0.89 is the only sub-1.0 in cohort — operational liquidity tight

downside_scenarios.scenario: Tests 52w low $56.01 on AI-substitution narrative or seat-growth deceleration
GAAP losses widen + macro SaaS stress; ~29% downside

ideal_entry.reasoning: Wait for retest of 52w low — negative GAAP earnings and tight current ratio warrant patience over scale-in

comparables.note: Profitable SaaS peer trades at 23% lower fwd PE
Profitable SaaS peer with dividend; better quality at small premium
Direct collaboration competitor not in input — premium reflects pure-play growth narrative

value_picks.analyst_take: Framework score (5.0) overstates quality — negative GAAP earnings, sub-1.0 current ratio, and AI threat to core Jira/Confluence moat make this the riskiest BUY-by-numbers in the cohort. WATCHLIST with $60 entry trigger; the 71% drawdown is real but so are the structural concerns. Best avoided until Rovo monetization or seat-growth reaccelerates.

value_picks.name: Accenture plc

pe_discount.detail: Fwd PE 12.09 vs implied PE at $250 target / $14.91 fwd EPS = 16.77 → 27.9% discount (just below 30% pass)

balance_sheet.detail: Net cash $1.06B; D/E 25.5%, CR 1.34 — pristine for size

dividend.detail: 3.62% yield (highest in cohort) with payout 51% — well-covered

ai_exposure.detail: Largest IT services player with explicit AI consulting investment ($3B+ committed); AI is offering tailwind near-term but long-term threat to staff-aug pricing leverage. Scale and partnerships (Microsoft, NVIDIA) provide moat advantage over peers.

deal_radar.assessment: Short interest only 3.27% (low) but +22.5% MoM build — bears just starting to position; FCF and dividend create strong defensive floor.

catalysts_general: ROE 24.8% — best operating efficiency in cohort
Trading 28% below analyst median target $250 with 27 covering analysts
$12.16B FCF supports both 3.6% dividend and continued buybacks

downside_scenarios.scenario: Federal contract cuts deepen; tests 52w low

ideal_entry.reasoning: Buy near 52w low for blue-chip quality at value-stock multiple; 3.6% yield-on-cost while waiting for federal overhang to clear

comparables.note: Smaller peer trades at 26% PE discount to ACN — quality vs. value tradeoff
Smaller engineering peer with stronger growth at deep discount
Legacy services peer not in input — trades at premium despite slower growth

value_picks.analyst_take: Highest-quality compounder in the cohort at the deepest valuation in years — 25% ROE, 11% FCF yield, 3.6% growing dividend, fortress balance sheet. The federal-spend overhang creates the entry; revenue growth will continue from commercial/AI consulting. BUY for income-oriented portfolios; accumulate $175-185 with patience for re-rating.

dividend.detail: 1.17% yield (below 2%) with payout 29% — covered but low yield

Earnings growth +48.5% indicates AI-monetization is showing in financials

ROE 23.5% with 80.9% gross margins — premium SaaS economics

downside_scenarios.scenario: Multi-quarter SMB-software slowdown + AI-disruption narrative; ~19% downside

ideal_entry.reasoning: Wait for retest of 52w low; FCF yield only 4.8% means valuation cushion is thinner than peers despite quality — be selective on entry

value_picks.analyst_take: Highest-quality SaaS economics in the cohort (21.6% net margin, 80.9% GM, 23.5% ROE) with strongest analyst conviction (1.47 rec_mean), but the 4.8% FCF yield is the thinnest cushion among the six — borderline on the value test. WATCHLIST near $365-375; if the tax-season print is clean, this becomes a high-conviction BUY at a better price.
